task_objective: Ensure BrowserView navigation buffer is cleared by navigating to about:blank when hidden/invisible to avoid stale HTML flashes.
design_decisions: Loaded about:blank into the BrowserView during its invisible state path to flush rendering/paint buffers.
Avoided direct modification of the show delay time as buffer flushing safely renders the visibility transition robust.
results: TDD Red static test was created and failed successfully, then greened with index.tsx implementation. All 236 pytest checks passed.
